The minimal SPIR-V fragment shader binary, encoded as a hex string (Little-Endian), is as follows:

```text
030223070000010000000000050000000000000011000200010000000E00030000000000010000000F00050004000000010000006D61696E0000000010000300010000000700000013000200020000002100030003000000020000003600050002000000010000000000000003000000F800020004000000FD00010038000100
```
